message:
fix(mcp-proxy): detect and skip duplicate route prefix collisions during proxy composition

Previously, if two remote MCP servers produced the same sanitized route prefix
(e.g. case-insensitive collision like "remote/github-copilot" vs
"REMOTE/GitHub-Copilot"), both would be mounted, causing undefined behavior
for tool/resource lookups.

Now:
- Track used route prefixes in a HashSet (case-insensitive via to_ascii_lowercase)
- On collision: fail-fast in proxy_strict mode, or warn and skip in lenient mode
- New insert_route_prefix helper + test for case-insensitive collision detection

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
